subcodes.first_line: O Nazar! Fix thy gaze upon the Most Great Vision. By God, the Truth, verily the Cause hath been exalted and made manifest, and Paradise hath been adorned [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا نظر فانظر بالمنظر الاکبر تالله الحق ان الامر علا و ظهر و زینت الجنه
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @spiritual transformation, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
